security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8000 http://localhost:8000; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://i.ytimg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8000 http://localhost:8000 ws://127.0.0.1:8000; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com

bundle.longDescription: Ingest a casebook once, interact with it forever: case briefs, Socratic drills, IRAC grading, transcript-to-emphasis mapping. All local, all single-user.
